title: Dataset
description: A durable landing zone (bucket/prefix + format) realized by an object-store Provider (s3/minio); populated by sink-mode Bindings.

format.description: Validated against the sink provider's SupportedSinkFormats() (e.g. json, jsonl, csv, parquet).

deletionPolicy.description: What Dataset destroy does to the stored objects: retain (default) keeps bucket contents — destroying the platform's record of a dataset must not destroy the data; delete removes every object under bucket/prefix. Instance teardown (Provider destroy) removes the backing store regardless.
